current.summary: Designed content-based classification feature: 3 panel reviews (4 personas × 5 rounds each), design doc with 9 components, implementation plan with 19 tasks, 19 beads created with dependency chains. Ready to execute in worktree.

activeWork.description: Content-based classification: design complete, plan validated, beads created, ready for execution
activeWork.progress: Full develop workflow complete through beads stage. Design doc covers 9 components (content-signal detector, user-directed discovery, quick-win patterns, README exclusion, sanitization boundary, strict mode, config persistence, audit traces, confidence tiers). 3 panel reviews with 4 personas (developer, security, DevOps, IT admin) across 13 rounds total. 4 blocking security requirements (B1-B4), 10 important requirements (I1-I10). Implementation plan: 19 tasks across 9 phases, validated (8 gaps found and fixed). 19 beads with 24 dependency links created.

git.lastCommit: ed40f51 docs: ACP spec final polish — 11 edge case fixes from third-round review

recentDecisions: Content-signal detector runs as FALLBACK only — after all pattern-based detectors, only on unmatched files
Dynamic converter signals are informational-only — excluded from threshold scoring to prevent injection attacks (B3)
All classification vocabulary hardcoded in binary — hook event names, fingerprints not loaded from converters (B4)
Threshold floor raised from 0.50 to 0.55 — eliminates .github/workflows/ false positives
Sanitization ordering: classify → sanitize → audit write (never raw values in audit log)
Layered config: org baseline → project additive → CLI additive, with locked + deny-scan-as
--strict mode: content-signal disabled, fatal errors, --no-config to suppress config files
Rejected confirm-bucket items re-surface by design (not persisted — attack surface concern)
User-directed zero-signal items labeled 'User-asserted, no content signals' not 'Medium confidence'
--debug-skips promoted to v1 scope (from follow-up), co-implements with structured output
nextSteps: Execute beads in a worktree — start with Phase 1 security foundations (3 P1 beads ready: s3fh6, 6219t, a4nur)
Commit design doc + implementation plan + develop state before starting execution
Phase 1 tasks are standalone (no deps) — can be parallelized
Pre-existing test failures still present: TestDoctorCheckRegistries_WithConfig, TestGenproviders_* (not related to this feature)

context.notes: User explicitly requested execution in a new session AND in a worktree. The develop state is at 'execute' stage in .develop/content-based-classification.json. 7 additional roadmap beads exist from panel nice-to-haves (syllago-xloq3, syllago-juw90, syllago-yx6c1, syllago-rnrb8, syllago-xjyng, syllago-p5wh4, syllago-8e170). Bead syllago-0byne (the original gap analysis bead) is also ready but overlaps with the new implementation beads. The design and plan files are uncommitted — commit them first. Some uncommitted files in git status are from other sessions (agent-skills-spec work).
